title: Peppery Irish Dates Stir-fry
description: A crisp and peppery Irish dates dish perfect for date nights, featuring full fat sour cream as a creamy topping.

ingredients.name: Irish Whiskey (Optional, for flavoring)
ingredients.notes: Use 1 oz or less for adults only

ingredients.name: Rice Noodles (For serving)
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a more filling dish

instructions: Soak the sour cherries in a cup of water and Irish whiskey for at least an hour.
After soaking, drain the cherries and place them on a baking sheet with paprika, salt, pepper, and butter. Bake until they are crispy, about 20-30 minutes.
In another pan, heat the full fat sour cream over medium heat. Once it starts to simmer slightly, add the drained Irish dates into the cream mixture.
Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until the dates have softened and the sauce is thick.
Serve hot with rice noodles or garnished with green onions.
